overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character navigating a dark, industrial nightclub bathed in red neon light. The player moves through a crowd of dancing NPCs toward a stage with holographic performers, explores the stage front area, then moves back into the crowd.

events.description: begins moving through the crowd toward the illuminated stage

agents.ego_description: navigating through dancing crowd members toward the stage at the far end of the club

notable_agents.action: dancer in red lighting moving rhythmically near the stage

entered.detail: elevated stage with holographic performers and large screen backdrop
tall vertical red neon light strips lining the club walls
metal mesh netting covering the ceiling with exposed industrial fixtures
perforated metal grid flooring covering the entire club floor

segments.scene_description: The player begins at the back of a dark industrial nightclub, facing a distant stage bathed in red neon light. The camera moves forward through a moderately dense crowd of dancing NPCs, approaching the stage while red neon pillars and industrial ceiling netting remain visible overhead.

events.description: passes wooden benches and tables on the right side near the stage
approaches the stage platform closely, moving past the seating area

agents.ego_description: moving past the bench seating on the right while approaching the stage performers

notable_agents.action: performer on stage playing guitar under red spotlights

entered.detail: simple wooden picnic-style tables and benches for club patrons
red and pink laser lights projecting from above the stage

segments.scene_description: The player moves deeper into the club, passing wooden benches on the right side while the stage grows larger in view. Red laser lights project across the scene as the player approaches the stage platform, with the crowd density remaining moderate around the seating area.

events.description: reaches the stage platform and looks up at the performers from below
moves along the stage edge, looking at different performers

agents.ego_description: examining the stage and performers up close from the front platform area

notable_agents.action: lead singer performing on stage edge above the player

entered.detail: raised metal platform at the front of the stage where performers stand
industrial metal wall with graffiti behind the performers

segments.scene_description: Now at the very front of the stage, the player explores the platform area where the performers are visible up close. The space is more enclosed here, with the stage back wall and industrial piping visible. The crowd thins out as the player moves along the stage edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: crowded dance floor and bar area

events.description: turns away from the stage and re-enters the dancing crowd
moves through denser crowd near the back bar area

agents.ego_description: navigating back through the crowd, observing different areas of the nightclub

notable_agents.action: patron dancing with arms raised in the red-lit crowd

entered.detail: bar area with bottles and neon lighting visible in the back of the club
additional seating and structural columns along the rear wall

segments.scene_description: The player turns away from the stage and moves back into the moderate crowd, exploring the rear areas of the nightclub. The bar counter becomes visible in the background as the player navigates through dancing patrons, with the stage now visible only in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the back of a dark industrial nightclub toward a neon-lit stage and back again. It begins by pushing through a moderately dense crowd of dancing patrons, moving under industrial ceiling netting and red neon pillars toward a distant glow. As the camera advances, the view expands to include wooden benches and sweeping red laser lights that guide the way toward the growing stage platform. The scene then shifts into a more enclosed space at the very front of the stage, where the camera explores the industrial piping and performers up close as the crowd thins. Finally, the perspective turns away from the stage and retreats back into the dancing crowd, with the stage receding into the distance as a bar counter emerges in the background.
